content:
{
  "mode": "method",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "test_kafka_connection_success",
      "input": {},
      "output": "Connection established",
      "args": ["valid_kafka_broker_url"],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates successful connection to Kafka broker."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_kafka_connection_failure",
      "input": {},
      "output": "Connection failed",
      "args": ["invalid_kafka_broker_url"],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests handling of connection failure to Kafka broker."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_event_handler_registration",
      "input": {},
      "output": "Handler registered",
      "args": ["avscan.action.scan", "AVScanActionScanHandler"],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Checks if event handler can be registered successfully."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_event_handler_execution",
      "input": {},
      "output": "Event processed",
      "args": ["avscan.action.scan", {"payload": "test data"}],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates that the event handler processes the event correctly."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_event_handler_logging",
      "input": {},
      "output": "Log entry created",
      "args": ["avscan.action.scan", {"payload": "test data"}],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Ensures that logging occurs before and after event handling."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_event_handler_error_handling",
      "input": {},
      "output": "Error logged",
      "args": ["avscan.action.scan", {"payload": "invalid data"}],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests that errors during event processing are logged correctly."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_multiple_event_handlers",
      "input": {},
      "output": "All handlers executed",
      "args": [["handler1", "handler2"]],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates that multiple handlers can be registered and executed."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_empty_event_payload",
      "input": {},
      "output": "No payload received",
      "args": ["avscan.action.scan", {}],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the behavior when an empty payload is received."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "Kafka broker is accessible and properly configured.",
  "notes": "Ensure that all handlers are implemented according to the base event handler interface."
}
